_readme: Context Guard config. Set your plan below. Trigger threshold = fraction of context window at which Claude is warned to run /session-save before next tool call.

free.label: Anthropic Free
free.note: Free tier — trigger slightly earlier due to rate limits

pro.label: Anthropic Pro ($20/mo)
pro.note: Pro plan — 75% trigger leaves ~50k tokens for save docs + /compact

api_tier2.label: API Tier 2+
api_tier2.note: API Tier 2+ — higher rate limits allow later trigger
